hero.subtitle: PrimeFx Invest is a secure international platform for portfolio management, transparent fees, and institutional-grade investor tools.

whyChoose.title: Why Thousands Choose Us
whyChoose.subtitle: Technology, security, and clear reporting — designed for investors who expect institutional standards.

features.title: AI-Powered Edge
features.description: Our tools analyze global markets to support informed investment decisions. Performance may vary with market conditions.

features.title: Diverse Opportunities
features.description: Access forex, commodities, indices, and digital assets across 150+ countries — all from one unified platform.

features.title: Bank-Level Security
features.description: 256-bit SSL encryption, cold storage, and multi-factor authentication keep your funds and data fully protected.

features.title: Expert Management
features.description: Experienced analysts and portfolio tools work alongside you — with full visibility into fees, payouts, and performance.

features.title: Transparent & Fair
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. Real-time portfolio tracking and detailed reports so you always know where you stand.

features.title: 24/7 Human Support
features.description: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock via live chat, email, and phone whenever you need help.

security.cardBody: Cada transacción está cifrada, verificada y monitoreada en tiempo real. Nunca comprometemos la seguridad de tu dinero.

items.quote: The dashboard gives me clear visibility into my portfolio, fees, and payout schedule. Support responded quickly when I had questions about verification.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: I appreciate the transparent fee breakdown and transaction history. The platform feels professional and easy to navigate on mobile.
items.name: James Okafor

items.quote: Security features like 2FA and clear withdrawal status gave me confidence. I can track everything without guesswork.
items.name: Elena Rodriguez

faq.title: Preguntas frecuentes
faq.subtitle: Todo lo que necesitas saber antes de comenzar.

items.question: Is PrimeAI Invest safe and secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use 256-bit SSL encryption, cold storage wallets, two-factor authentication, and are fully compliant with global financial regulations.

items.question: What is the minimum investment amount?
items.answer: You can start with as little as $50 on our Starter Plan. Higher-tier plans have higher minimums. Investment performance may vary.

items.question: How often can I withdraw my profits?
items.answer: Withdrawals are processed every 7 days on all plans. You can also access your capital anytime with no lock-in periods.

items.question: How does the AI investment system work?
items.answer: Our tools analyze market data to support portfolio decisions. Performance depends on market conditions and your selected plan. PrimeAI provides informational guidance only.

items.question: What returns can I realistically expect?
items.answer: Returns vary by plan and market conditions. Weekly target returns range from 3% on the Starter Plan to 5% on the Elite Plan. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

items.question: Do I need investment experience to get started?
items.answer: Not at all. PrimeFx Invest is designed for everyone — from complete beginners to seasoned investors. Our platform handles everything for you.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept bank transfers, credit/debit cards, and major cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.question: Is there a mobile app available?
items.answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available on both iOS and Android, giving you full access to your portfolio, deposits, withdrawals, and support on the go.

faq.a1: Completa KYC, financia tu wallet, elige un plan e invierte desde tu panel.
faq.a2: Varían según el plan. Los planes Starter comienzan en $50.
faq.a3: Ve a Perfil → Verificación y completa el flujo KYC. La mayoría termina en 24–48 horas.
faq.a4: Dependen del plan y tipo de transacción.
faq.a5: Los retiros cripto vía NOWPayments suelen procesarse en pocas horas tras la aprobación.
faq.a6: Gana recompensas completando logros, refiriendo inversores y subiendo de rango.
faq.a7: Comparte tu enlace desde Referidos y Gana. Ganas comisiones cuando tus referidos depositan e invierten.
faq.a8: Ve a Wallet → Depósito, ingresa el monto y paga vía NOWPayments. Los fondos se acreditan tras confirmación.

deposit.title: Depositar fondos
deposit.subtitleForm: Pague con Binance Pay o cripto vía NOWPayments.
deposit.subtitleReady: Su sesión de pago está lista.
deposit.currencyHint: BNB/BUSD usan Binance Pay. Otras opciones abren una factura en USD — elige la moneda exacta en la página de NOWPayments.
deposit.completeInTab: Complete el pago en la pestaña {provider}. Si no se abrió, use el botón de abajo.
deposit.confirmBinance: Haga clic en confirmar para abrir Binance Pay en una nueva pestaña.
deposit.confirmNowPayments: Haga clic en confirmar para abrir NOWPayments en una nueva pestaña. El monto se cobra en USD.
deposit.qrAvailable: El enlace de pago QR está disponible en la página de checkout
deposit.invalidAmount: Ingrese un monto de depósito válido.
deposit.refreshCurrenciesError: No se pudieron actualizar las monedas de pago
deposit.refreshCurrenciesHint: Usando opciones cripto predeterminadas. Intente de nuevo si el depósito falla.
deposit.popupBlocked: No se pudo abrir la página de pago
deposit.popupBlockedHint: Permita ventanas emergentes para este sitio o use el enlace de abajo.
deposit.paymentCreatedDesc: Confirme abajo para abrir la página de checkout en una nueva pestaña.
deposit.addressReadyDesc: Envíe cripto a la dirección mostrada abajo.
deposit.paymentPageOpenedDesc: Complete el pago en la nueva pestaña. Puede volver aquí cuando termine.

withdraw.title: Retirar fondos
withdraw.description: Los retiros cripto se procesan mediante pagos masivos de NOWPayments.
withdraw.addressPlaceholder: Pegue su dirección de wallet cripto
withdraw.invalidAmount: Ingrese un monto de retiro válido.
withdraw.refreshCurrenciesError: No se pudieron actualizar las monedas de retiro
withdraw.refreshCurrenciesHint: Usando opciones cripto predeterminadas. Intente de nuevo si el retiro falla.
withdraw.submittedDesc: Su pago está siendo procesado por NOWPayments.

errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient wallet balance. Please deposit funds first.

recommendation.title: Not sure which plan is right for you?

howItWorks.title: How investing works
howItWorks.description: Pick a plan below, fund your wallet, and profits are distributed weekly. Capital can be withdrawn with a short notice period.
